calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-02-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-09-2015 Continued To Mar-02-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-26-2015 Continued To Feb-09-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-29-2014 Continued To Jan-26-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Terrence Mayo for (petitioner) Larry Shaw.

The court asked why the petition should not be amended to include a request to determine entitlement and notice to all siblings. Mr. Mayo stated that Mr. Shaw and his wife cared for the decedent, loaned him money, were best friends for a long period of time, that the family understands this and has no objections regarding the will not including all of the assets of the decedent, and that an additional declaration from Mr. Shaw can be provided. The court expressed concern that there are disclaimers from some but not all siblings and suggests continuing the matter. Mr. Mayo suggests noticing the heirs at law regarding the new hearing date, providing copies of the petition without being amended and agrees disclaimers are relevant. Mr. Mayo also spoke of the extraordinary fees, explaining that Ms. Mayo participated in mediation of the Freeman Estate and was able to obtain additional amounts for distribution in this estate and feels that the fees are quite fair. The accounting petition was continued to January 26, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court is to determine how to proceed with respect to amending/not amending the petition. If appropriate, the matter may be under submission on January 26, 2015.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Saephon. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Granted Per Written Order
